title: Canonicalize L2/CoAP comments in lichen/apps/gateway/boards/heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf
description: Adopt the consolidated Full L2 + CoAP path comments, radio arbitration notes, and TDMA/TINYCRYPT details from the puck canonical version. Remove any outdated merge artifacts. Ensure gateway-specific settings (WiFi, RPL root, stacks) remain.
